name: Notional currency—Leg 1
description: The ISO 4217 currency codes for the currencies in which Notional amount—Leg 1 is denominated.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where Notional amount—Leg 1 is reported, for Action types NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI.
Not reported for Action types TERM, EROR, PRTO.
valueRules: Exclude the reporting of the non-currency ISO 4217 codes of XAG, XAU, XBA, XBB, XBC, XBD, XDR, XEU, XFU, XPD, XPT and XTS.
For an FX option, other than a digital option, Notional currency—Leg 1 is equal to one of Call currency or Put currency.

For an FX transaction where the underlier is a currency index or a basket of currencies, the denomination of the underlier is as ‘index units’ or ‘basket units’ and not as ‘currency units’. In this case, we expect that the index or basket is reported as leg 2 and Notional currency—Leg 2 is reported as the ISO 4217 code of XXX.
